data.title: Shinhan Financial Group to Cancel Up to KRW 700 Billion in Treasury Shares After Buyback
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Shinhan Financial Group Co ( (SHG) ) has provided an announcement.

On July 23, 2026, Shinhan Financial Group’s board approved the cancellation of 6,698,565 treasury common shares, representing stock with a face value of KRW 5,000 per share and an estimated total cancellation amount of KRW 700 billion. The move covers one treasury share acquired via a past comprehensive share exchange and the bulk of shares to be repurchased on the Korea Exchange between July 31 and October 22, 2026, under rules requiring cancellation within one year of acquisition.

The company stressed that while the number of issued shares will fall from its current 469,450,239 common shares, the total capital will remain unchanged because the cancellation is executed within profits available for dividends under Article 343 of the Korean Commercial Code. This large-scale share reduction is poised to enhance per-share metrics and signals a shareholder-friendly capital return strategy, though the final number of shares and cancellation amount may vary with market prices and will be confirmed in a later filing.

Spark’s Take on SHG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SHG is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved profitability and a supportive earnings-call outlook with clear capital-return targets, reinforced by attractive valuation (low P/E and solid yield). These positives are tempered by financial quality risks—especially weak/volatile TTM free cash flow, elevated leverage, and earnings-call flags around CET1 pressure, rising credit costs, and lower NPL coverage—while technical signals remain mixed.

To see Spark’s full report on SHG stock,
click here.

More about Shinhan Financial Group Co

Shinhan Financial Group Co., Ltd. is a leading South Korean financial services conglomerate based in Seoul, operating across banking, credit cards, securities, insurance and other non-bank finance. The group focuses on retail and corporate banking, wealth management and capital markets, with its common shares listed on the Korea Exchange and in the U.S. as a foreign private issuer.

Average Trading Volume: 257,609

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $33.02B

data.title: LG Display Schedules Late-July 2026 Domestic Non-Deal Roadshow on Q2 Results
data.description:

The latest announcement is out from LG Display ( (LPL) ).

LG Display announced that it will hold a domestic non-deal roadshow in Seoul from July 28 to July 30, 2026, targeting domestic institutional investors. The sessions, sponsored by iM Securities, will focus on presenting the company’s second-quarter 2026 financial results and include one-on-one meetings and Q&A.

While the event does not involve a capital-raising transaction, it underscores LG Display’s effort to maintain active dialogue with institutional stakeholders around its financial performance and outlook. By offering direct access to management in a one-on-one format, the company is seeking to bolster transparency and potentially support investor confidence amid ongoing competition and volatility in the display sector.

Spark’s Take on LPL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LPL is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (high leverage, negative free cash flow, and a return to TTM losses) and bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). The latest earnings call provides some offset via improving underlying operations and upbeat Q3 shipment/ASP guidance, but losses, FX impacts, and competitive pressures keep overall risk elevated; valuation is also limited by a negative P/E and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on LPL stock,
click here.

More about LG Display

LG Display Co., Ltd. is a South Korea-based manufacturer of display panels, supplying LCD and OLED products for televisions, mobile devices, IT screens and automotive applications. The company serves global electronics brands and operates in the highly competitive flat-panel display market, where capital-intensive production and cyclical demand trends shape profitability and investment needs.

data.title: Huaqin lifts Nexchip stake to 10.91% in discloseable Hong Kong deal
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Huaqin Technology Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:3296) ) has shared an announcement.

Huaqin Telecom, a wholly owned unit of Huaqin Co., Ltd., has increased its stake in Nexchip Semiconductor through an on-market purchase of 1,996,000 H shares in Hong Kong for about HK$65.8 million, lifting the group’s holding to roughly 10.91 percent. The acquisition, funded entirely with internal cash and based on prevailing market prices, expands Huaqin’s exposure to Nexchip’s 12-inch wafer foundry business, potentially deepening its integration into the semiconductor value chain.

Under Hong Kong listing rules, this latest purchase is aggregated with a series of Nexchip stake builds completed since August 2025, taking the combined transaction size over the 5 percent threshold but below 25 percent. As a result, the deal is classified as a discloseable transaction requiring reporting and public announcement but not shareholder approval, underscoring Huaqin’s ongoing strategic accumulation of Nexchip shares within regulatory limits.

More about Huaqin Technology Co., Ltd. Class H

Huaqin Co., Ltd. is a China-based technology company with a telecom-focused subsidiary, Huaqin Telecom, that actively invests in semiconductor-related assets to support its broader electronics and communications business. The group’s portfolio strategy includes building stakes in foundry operators such as Nexchip Semiconductor, positioning it closer to a key segment of the global chip manufacturing supply chain.

Average Trading Volume: 3,294,321

Current Market Cap: HK$109.7B

See more data about 3296 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Athelney Trust holds dividend line as NAV slips but discount narrows
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Athelney ( (GB:ATY) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Athelney Trust reported a 3.8% decline in net asset value to 163.1p per share for the half year to 30 June 2026, with gross revenue down 24.5% to £101,002 and revenue return per share at 4.0p. Despite weaker income and a challenging backdrop for UK smaller companies, the trust maintained its share price at 165p and upheld its progressive dividend approach, including an interim payout of 2.4p.

The discount to NAV narrowed to 1.1%, well below the wider UK Smaller Companies sector average, underscoring solid investor support and a relatively attractive yield of 6.1%. The board remains confident in its strategy of backing high-quality, cash-generative small caps and argues that historically low valuations and ongoing M&A activity create upside potential as sentiment towards UK smaller companies improves, even amid persistent geopolitical and macroeconomic uncertainty.

Spark’s Take on ATY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ATY is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by volatile and currently loss-making financial performance, despite a notably low-risk balance sheet (no debt). Technical signals are also soft (negative MACD and price below longer-term averages). A high dividend yield supports the score, but losses (negative P/E) reduce valuation clarity.

To see Spark’s full report on ATY stock,
click here.

More about Athelney

Athelney Trust plc is a London-listed investment trust focused on equity securities of quoted UK companies, particularly smaller caps on the LSE, AIM and AQSE. It targets long-term growth in dividends and capital by investing in quality, profitable small-cap businesses that appear undervalued on earnings, dividend prospects or asset backing, while maintaining a progressive dividend policy and diversified sector exposure.

data.title: West Pharmaceutical Raises 2026 Guidance After Strong Quarter
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

West Pharmaceutical Services ( (WST) ) has shared an announcement.

West Pharmaceutical Services reported strong second-quarter 2026 results on July 23, 2026, with net sales rising 13.8% to $872.3 million and organic growth of 12.7%, driven largely by its High-Value Product Components and Delivery Devices businesses serving biologics and GLP-1 treatments. Diluted EPS increased 18.1% to $2.15, adjusted-diluted EPS climbed 28.8% to $2.37, free cash flow reached $128 million, and the company underscored confidence in its outlook by repurchasing 1.8 million shares for $454.3 million in the first half and declaring a third-quarter dividend of $0.22 per share.

Proprietary Products net sales grew 16.6% to $722.6 million, with HVP Components accounting for nearly half of total company sales and HVP Delivery Devices up almost 30%, while the West Vantage segment posted modest growth and contributed 17% of revenue. Management raised full-year 2026 guidance, now projecting net sales of $3.345 billion to $3.38 billion and higher adjusted-diluted EPS of $8.85 to $9.05, and introduced third-quarter guidance that points to continued organic growth, signaling sustained demand for its high-value injectable solutions and reinforcing its positioning in the biologics and advanced drug delivery market.

The most recent analyst rating on (WST) stock is a Buy
with a $410.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on West Pharmaceutical Services stock,
see the WST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WST is a Outperform.

WST scores well on strong underlying fundamentals (especially the low-leverage balance sheet and solid profitability) and supportive technical momentum (price above key moving averages with positive MACD). The latest earnings call further strengthens the outlook with raised FY2026 guidance and continued margin expansion drivers. These positives are partially offset by a relatively expensive valuation (high P/E and low dividend yield).

To see Spark’s full report on WST stock,
click here.

More about West Pharmaceutical Services

West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. is a leading provider of innovative, high-quality injectable solutions and services for drug developers, helping ensure the safe, effective containment and delivery of life-saving and life-enhancing medicines. Headquartered in Exton, Pennsylvania, the company operates more than 50 sites, including 26 manufacturing facilities, employs over 10,000 people worldwide and delivered $3.07 billion in net sales in fiscal 2025, with its shares listed on the NYSE and included in the S&P 500 index.

West supplies over 41 billion components and devices annually, with a portfolio that spans high-value product components, delivery devices and standard products used across biologics and other injectable therapies. Its operations are organized around segments including Proprietary Products and West Vantage, with a growing emphasis on high-value components and devices that support advanced treatments such as GLP-1 therapies and other biologics-focused applications.

Average Trading Volume: 794,581

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $25.38B

data.title: Novosense Shareholders Approve 2026 A Share Restricted Share Incentive Scheme
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Suzhou Novosense Microlectronics Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2676) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Suzhou Novosense Microelectronics Co., Ltd. held an extraordinary shareholders’ meeting on July 23, 2026, in Suzhou, with all nine directors in attendance and voting conducted both on-site and online in compliance with PRC laws and the company’s articles. Of the 162,131,389 shares eligible to vote, shareholders or proxies holding 74,052,328 shares, representing about 45.67% of voting shares, participated, with no shareholders required to abstain or indicating opposition in advance.

Shareholders approved three special resolutions related to the company’s 2026 A Share Restricted Share Incentive Scheme, including the draft plan, its implementation and appraisal measures, and authorization for the board to handle related matters. Each resolution received approximately 99.76% of votes cast in favor, underscoring strong shareholder support for the incentive scheme, which is expected to influence the company’s long-term employee alignment and corporate governance practices.

More about Suzhou Novosense Microlectronics Co. Ltd. Class H

Suzhou Novosense Microelectronics Co., Ltd. is a PRC-based semiconductor company listed in Hong Kong under stock code 2676, focusing on microelectronics solutions and operating with both A shares and H shares in the capital market. The company maintains a dual-share structure and follows PRC Company Law and Hong Kong Listing Rules in its corporate governance and shareholder meeting procedures.

data.title: Ermenegildo Zegna Posts Double‑Digit Q2 2026 Revenue Growth on DTC Momentum
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Ermenegildo Zegna ( (ZGN) ) has shared an announcement.

Ermenegildo Zegna Group reported unaudited H1 2026 revenues of €987.3 million on July 23, 2026, a 6.4% year‑on‑year increase, with organic growth at 9.3%. Second‑quarter revenues rose 10.3% to €517.1 million, driven by strong performance of the ZEGNA brand, which grew 16.9% year‑on‑year, and solid contributions from TOM FORD FASHION and Thom Browne despite ongoing wholesale rationalization.

The group’s direct‑to‑consumer channel was the key growth engine in Q2 2026, with revenues up 16.4% year‑on‑year and 17.3% organically as all three brands delivered double‑digit retail gains. Management highlighted accelerating momentum across regions, particularly in the Americas and a strengthening Greater China Region, underscoring the strategic shift toward a client‑centric, retail‑first model that supports the company’s long‑term growth ambitions and enhances its competitive positioning in global luxury.

The most recent analyst rating on (ZGN) stock is a Buy
with a $15.40 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ermenegildo Zegna stock,
see the ZGN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ZGN Stock

The score is driven mainly by solid financial quality (especially cash generation and improving leverage) and an attractive valuation (low P/E). These positives are moderated by cautious 2026 outlook factors from the earnings call (FX headwinds, SG&A pressure, wholesale contraction) and technically overbought signals despite a strong uptrend.

To see Spark’s full report on ZGN stock,

More about Ermenegildo Zegna

Ermenegildo Zegna Group is an Italy‑based global luxury fashion house best known for its high‑end menswear, textile operations and increasingly diversified portfolio of brands including ZEGNA, Thom Browne and TOM FORD FASHION. Listed on the NYSE, the group focuses on premium apparel and accessories with a retail‑first, direct‑to‑consumer strategy targeting affluent clients across the Americas, Europe and Asia, including the Greater China Region.

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Amalgamated Bank ( (AMAL) ) has issued an announcement.

Amalgamated Financial Corp. reported record second-quarter 2026 results on July 23, 2026, with net income rising to $34.8 million, or $1.15 per diluted share, and core net income reaching $33.1 million. Management highlighted the company’s strongest-ever balance sheet and a scalable platform, as net revenue hit $98.4 million and net interest margin improved to 3.78% on higher-yielding commercial loans and securities.

Deposits expanded sharply, with on-balance sheet deposits up $280.3 million to $8.5 billion and political deposits growing 11.4% to $2.1 billion, surpassing their prior election-cycle peak. Loans increased $114.9 million to $5.1 billion, capital ratios remained robust, and shareholders benefited from higher tangible book value, a newly approved $40 million share repurchase program on June 9, 2026, and continued dividends, underscoring stronger profitability and capital return capacity.

The most recent analyst rating on (AMAL) stock is a Hold
with a $48.00 price target.

see the AMAL Stock Forecast page.

AMAL’s score is driven primarily by solid financial performance—strong profitability, meaningful deleveraging, and robust cash generation. Technicals are supportive with an established uptrend, though momentum is not deeply compelling. Guidance was raised, but the single-borrower credit issue and elevated nonperforming assets introduce near-term risk. data.title: DEA convenes shareholders to overhaul board and top management
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Distribuzione Elettrica Adriatica S.p.A ( (IT:DEA) ) has shared an announcement.

DEA has called an ordinary shareholders’ meeting for 7 August 2026, with a possible second call on 8 August, to be held exclusively via telecommunication with voting exercised through a designated representative in line with Italian TUF rules. The agenda includes the proposed removal of directors Alessandro Morini and Micaela Cristina Capelli, the appointment of two new board members with defined terms and remuneration, and the termination of General Manager Massimiliano Riderelli Belli, his network contract and co‑employment arrangement, signaling a significant reshaping of the company’s top management and governance framework.

The company detailed procedures for shareholders’ entitlement to attend and vote, highlighting record dates, intermediary communications, and proxy mechanisms, while confirming that no treasury or subsidiary-held shares are outstanding. DEA has also made the meeting documentation and explanatory reports publicly available on its website and Borsa Italiana’s platform, and reserved the right to adjust meeting information in response to regulatory changes, underscoring an emphasis on formal compliance and transparency for investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:DEA) stock is a Buy
with a EUR12.30 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Distribuzione Elettrica Adriatica S.p.A stock,
see the IT:DEA Stock Forecast page.

More about Distribuzione Elettrica Adriatica S.p.A

Distribuzione Elettrica Adriatica S.p.A. (DEA) is a leading Italian operator in electricity distribution and public lighting, active across the regions of Abruzzo, Marche, Liguria and Lombardy. The company is admitted to trading on Euronext Growth Milan, a multilateral trading system organized by Borsa Italiana, and serves local communities with network and lighting infrastructure services.

Average Trading Volume: 4,503

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €68.07M

For an in-depth examination of DEA stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

RELX plc ( (GB:REL) ) just unveiled an update.

RELX plc has announced a change in its board governance structure, appointing Andy Halford as Chair of the Audit Committee following the publication of its first-half 2026 results. The move refreshes oversight of the company’s financial reporting and risk controls, underscoring the importance of board-level scrutiny as RELX continues to manage complex, data-centric operations.

As part of the reshuffle, Suzanne Wood has stepped down from the Audit Committee but remains a key figure on the RELX board as Senior Independent Director. She will continue to influence governance through her roles on the Remuneration, Nominations and Corporate Governance Committees, maintaining continuity while allowing new leadership in the audit function.
